_meta.description: Master tracker for Nature knockout predictions — VETTED

universal_eta_correct_groups.description: η = dim(V^G)/dim(V) predicts instability rate when group is correctly identified
universal_eta_correct_groups.caveat: Only 7/16 instances have well-characterized groups. Group identification is the bottleneck.

universal_eta_all_domains.description: Universal law across ALL domains — group assignments are too approximate for many instances

phase_transition_existence.description: Sharp sigmoidal transition in explanation instability exists

phase_transition_at_r_equals_1.description: Transition occurs at r*≈0.06-0.10, not r*≈1. Confounded by signal dilution.

uncertainty_principle_bound.description: α+σ+δ ≤ 2 does NOT hold. Binary impossibility (no method at 1,1,1) IS confirmed.

interpretability_ceiling.note: Result stronger than prediction: observed 0/n stable, not ≤1/n

molecular_evolution.description: Character theory adds nothing beyond counting synonymous neighbors
